summary: Crystal‑clear recording captures an on‑fire first set highlighted by a soaring Promised Land
review: The reviewer praises the performance, noting that the first set “sets the tone” and that the band was “on fire,” with a particularly thrilling rendition of "Promised Land." The audio is described as “crystal clear,” indicating an excellent listening experience despite the lack of detailed source information.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one positive 4‑star review; both show and recording are praised, leading to an overall good rating but limited data reduces confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the upload “crystal clear,” noting no audible issues or distortions.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as setting the tone and delivering high energy, with the band “on fire” throughout.
